test.create_query: CREATE TABLE orders(o_orderkey Int32, o_custkey Int32, o_totalprice Decimal(15, 2)) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY o_orderkey
CREATE TABLE customer(c_custkey Int32, c_nationkey Int32) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY c_custkey
CREATE TABLE nation(n_nationkey Int32, n_name String) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY n_nationkey
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO orders SELECT number, number/10000, number%1000 FROM numbers(100000000)
INSERT INTO customer SELECT number, 5 FROM numbers(1)
INSERT INTO customer SELECT number+1, 6 FROM numbers(100)
INSERT INTO customer SELECT number+1000, 7 FROM numbers(10000)
test.query: SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=0

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'FRANCE') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'FRANCE') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'FRANCE') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=10

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'GERMANY') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'GERMANY') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=20000

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'GERMANY') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=10

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'WAKANDA') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0

SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN (SELECT * FROM customer JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey WHERE n_name = 'WAKANDA') AS cn ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1
SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN customer ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0
SELECT avg(o_totalprice) FROM orders JOIN customer ON c_custkey = o_custkey SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE fact_wide(key UInt64, value UInt64) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY key
CREATE TABLE dim_10k(key UInt64) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY key
CREATE TABLE dim_100k(key UInt64) ENGINE MergeTree ORDER BY key
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO fact_wide SELECT number % 1000000, number FROM numbers(100000000)
INSERT INTO dim_10k SELECT number * 100 FROM numbers(10000)
INSERT INTO dim_100k SELECT number * 10 FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT sum(value) FROM fact_wide JOIN dim_10k ON fact_wide.key = dim_10k.key SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0
SELECT sum(value) FROM fact_wide JOIN dim_10k ON fact_wide.key = dim_10k.key SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=0
SELECT sum(value) FROM fact_wide JOIN dim_100k ON fact_wide.key = dim_100k.key SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=0
SELECT sum(value) FROM fact_wide JOIN dim_100k ON fact_wide.key = dim_100k.key SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filters=1, join_runtime_filter_exact_values_limit=0
